title: Samurai Vendetta
actors: Raizô Ichikawa, Shintarô Katsu, Chitose Maki
plot: Tange Tenzen and Nakayama Yasubei are honorable samurai living in an era of corrupt officials and treacherous clans. But after finding themselves in opposing clans and ensnared in a love triangle, only bloodshed can ensue! An epic...
